data.title: Organicville revamps its line with new no-seed oil dressings in popular flavors. Exciting changes for 2026.
data.description: A popular selection of organic condiments, dressings, and marinades is receiving a makeover, introducing a fresh range of no-seed oil dressings featuring well-loved flavors. The company, based in SANDPOINT, Idaho, announced this update on Jan. 26, 2026. This collection is sure to appeal to customers looking for plant-based options, with a focus on organic ingredients. Organicville is aiming to cater to a wide audience with these new additions, marking a significant change in their product line for the year.

data.title: 149M records leaked in infostealer data dump, incl. 420K Binance logins, highlighting risks to crypto users.
data.description: A recent discovery by a researcher revealed a massive credential dump consisting of 149 million records obtained from infostealer malware. Among the compromised data were approximately 420,000 logins for the popular cryptocurrency exchange Binance. This breach highlights the increasing vulnerability faced by users in the crypto community as cyber threats continue to evolve and become more sophisticated.
US TRANSPORTATION SECRETARY DUFFY SAYS HOPE TO GET BACK TO NORMAL FLIGHTS SCHEDULE ON WEDNESDAY

data.title: Draper secures part of a $25.35 billion contract with DMEA, one of ten companies selected for a 10-year program.
data.description: A company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Draper has secured a spot along with nine other companies on a lucrative 10-year contract worth $25.35 billion. This contract is for the Defense Microelectronics Activity (DMEA) Advanced Technology Support Program (ATSP). Draper's inclusion in this program will enable them to provide support in advanced technology services.

data.title: PureHealth Research launches botanical supplement for lymph system support in Jan 2026, aiming to address overlooked component in wellness industry.
data.description: In Manassas, Virginia, on January 26, 2026, PureHealth Research introduced its top supplements for supporting the lymph system, emphasizing its importance in overall health. Despite the prevalent focus on liver cleanses in the wellness sector, the lymphatic system tends to be neglected.

data.title: Akari Therapeutics introduces new patent and second ADC program AKTX-102 for CEACAM5-positive solid tumors.
data.description: In yesterday's announcement, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, which is the lowest it has been in the last decade. This decrease signifies a significant improvement in the job market, with over 300,000 new jobs created in the past month. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 2.5% increase, reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this positive economic growth to various factors, such as increased consumer spending and successful government policies.Overall, the economic outlook appears promising, with forecasts predicting continued growth in the upcoming months.

data.title: Maris-Tech and Sidus Space advance integration for LizzieSat-4 mission with hardware testing; launch planned this year.
data.description: A payload by Maris-Tech will be launched on LizzieSat-4 for hardware testing and platform integration before its scheduled launch later this year.

data.title: Trump's exec order aims to fast track marijuana reclassification, may stabilize market; changes likely for related businesses.
data.description: In Oldwick, New Jersey, a recent executive order by the Trump administration aims to expedite the reclassification of marijuana under federal law, potentially bringing significant impacts to cannabis-related businesses. Currently, these businesses face challenges in obtaining specialized insurance coverage due to the complex underwriting process. The order signed by President Trump is geared towards advancing research on medical marijuana, which could result in improved understanding of the industry.

GOLDMAN: FED TO HOLD STEADY Goldman Sachs expects the January FOMC meeting to be uneventful, with broad consensus to keep rates unchanged. Governors Waller and Bowman are likely to support the decision, leaving Stephen Miran as the lone dissenter. Goldman forecasts two rate cuts
HOMAN TO ALSO COORDINATE W/ OTHERS ON ONGOING FRAUD PROBES - CNN

data.title: Dow futures rise, S&P 500 slips as investors brace for earnings reports. Durable goods orders surged 5.3% in November. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.21%. Stocks In Focus:Baker Hughes up 3.74% after upbeat Q4 earnings. Fed likely to keep interest rates unchanged in January.
data.description: U.S. stock futures were fluctuating on Monday after a mixed close on Friday. U.S. durable goods orders for November soared by 5.3%, surpassing the 3.1% forecast. Major benchmark indices were mixed. This week, investors are watching earnings reports from companies like UnitedHealth Group Inc., General Motors Co., Microsoft Corp., Meta Platforms Inc., Tesla Inc., Starbucks Corp., and others. The Federal Open Market Committee will announce its decision on interest rates on Wednesday. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.21% and the two-year bond was at 3.59%. The likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in January is projected at 97.2%. Index Performance showed the Dow Jones at -0.12%, S&P 500 at -0.24%, Nasdaq 100 at -0.44%, and Russell 2000 at -0.29%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was down 0.015% at $689.13, while the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF declined 0.17% to $621.69. Baker Hughes Co. was 3.74% higher in premarket after reporting better-than-expected results for the fourth quarter.

data.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy purchases 2,932 Bitcoin for $264 million, now holding over 712,000 BTC per SEC filing.
data.description: Last week, Strategy made a significant investment in Bitcoin, spending $264 million during a market decline. This move increased their total Bitcoin holdings to over 712,000 BTC, as reported in a recent SEC filing on Monday.

data.title: Ubiquity Retirement + Savings names James Hobson as new CEO to drive growth in small business retirement platform.
data.description: A financial services and insurtech expert has joined Ubiquity to bolster its small business retirement platform in partnership-focused efforts. The San Francisco-based company, Ubiquity Retirement + Savings, known for its innovation and leadership in the small business sector, made this strategic move on Jan. 26, 2026. This initiative signals a crucial step forward in the company's growth trajectory.

data.title: myKaarma launches AI video grader & tools to enhance video quality, increase revenue. Technician videos can drive up to $90 more per repair order, saving dealerships 25+ hours/month.
data.description: Initial data from a pilot study indicates that the use of high-quality technician videos can increase repair orders by up to $90. Furthermore, the implementation of new AI technology for communications and scheduling has been found to save dealerships more than 25 hours per month. The findings were presented by myKaarma, a prominent company offering comprehensive service lane and payment solutions, based in Long Beach, California. This information was disclosed on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Wahlburgers plans to expand nationwide in 2026, offering its iconic burgers and hospitality to more guests.
data.description: In January 26, 2026, Burger brand Wahlburgers, established by brothers Mark, Donnie, and Chef Paul Wahlberg, is set to expand its presence in the United States during the year. The popular brand, known for its iconic menu and warm hospitality, will speed up its growth strategy, allowing more customers to experience its offerings.

data.title: StockHero releases Version 4; automated trading popular among retail investors. Major advancement in stock trading.
data.description: StockHero has launched StockHero Version 4 in Singapore on Jan. 26, 2026. This release marks a significant milestone for stock traders as automated trading, previously only accessible to hedge funds and institutional desks, is now available for retail traders. This latest version is expected to revolutionize the trading industry.

data.title: Satellogic set to raise $35M in direct stock offering.
data.description: The latest report on the economy reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, the lowest in the past decade. Additionally, the GDP has seen a growth of 5.2% this quarter, marking a significant increase from the previous months. The stock market has also shown positive performance, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Analysts predict further growth in the coming months, attributing it to various government policies and increasing consumer confidence. Inflation remains steady at 2.5%, indicating a stable economic environment. Overall, the economic outlook appears optimistic with promising indicators across different sectors.
